mapper.select: select setting_code_id, user_id, setting_group_name, setting_name, default_yn, use_yn from setting_code where user_id = #{userId} and setting_group_name in ('g001', 'g002', 'g003') order by setting_group_name, setting_code_id

select setting_code_id, user_id, setting_group_name, setting_name, default_yn, use_yn from setting_code where user_id = #{userId} and setting_group_name in ('g001', 'g002', 'g003')
and setting_group_name in
#{settingGroupName}
and upper(setting_name) like '%' || upper(#{settingName}) || '%'
and default_yn in
#{defaultYn}
order by setting_group_name, setting_code_id
select setting_code_id, user_id, setting_group_name, setting_name, default_yn, use_yn from setting_code where user_id = #{userId} and setting_group_name = #{settingGroupName} order by setting_code_id
select setting_code_id, user_id, setting_group_name, setting_name, default_yn, use_yn from setting_code where user_id = #{userId} and setting_code_id = #{settingCodeId}
mapper.insert:
select 'SETTING_CODE_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_' || lpad( nvl(max(to_number(substr(setting_code_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) from setting_code where substr(setting_code_id, 1, 18) = 'SETTING_CODE_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_'
insert into setting_code ( setting_code_id, user_id, setting_group_name, setting_name, default_yn ) values ( #{settingCodeId}, #{userId}, #{settingGroupName}, #{settingName}, #{defaultYn} )
mapper.select: select setting_code_id, user_id, setting_group_name, setting_name, default_yn, use_yn from setting_code where user_id = #{userId} and setting_group_name = #{settingGroupName} and setting_code_id != #{deleteSettingCodeId} order by setting_code_id
mapper.update: update setting_code set setting_code_id = setting_code_id where 1 = 0
